channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Northern California six players set their sights on poker glory and draw dead aim on a million dollar first place prize.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour heads back to the woods of Connecticut where a Yale senior is looking to ace this final and pocket the lion's share of a $4,000,000 prize pool.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The biggest little city in the world hosts the largest tournament in Northern Nevada history and the World Poker Tour captures all the final table excitement.

programme.title: Pink Panther Strikes Again
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) is finally driven mad by Inspector Clouseau's (Peter Sellers) incompetence and commandeers a doomsday device along with a demand for Clouseau’s death. Are 26 hired assassins a match for Clouseau's dumb luck?

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Escape from Women's Prison
programme.desc: Four female convicts escape from prison and take a bus full of young female athletes hostage, and take refuge in a judge's house. Soon enough, the police surrounds the place, but the escapees are not giving up without a fight.

programme.title: Valhalla: Legend of Thor
programme.desc: When Thor and Loki seek refuge in the home of mortals, the youngest son fails to heed a warning from the gods.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: After being released from prison after serving 13 years for manslaughter, AJ’s dreams of living a pleasant crime-free life soon come to an end when he discovers his closest childhood friend Jack, has been marked for death.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: The Crocodile Hunter (Steve Irwin) is trying to save a feisty croc from poachers. What he doesn't know is that the crocodile has swallowed a top secret U.S. satellite beacon, and the poachers are actually American special agents sent to retrieve it.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Watching Over You
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah moves into the suburbs and starts dating a firefighter, only to find herself the target of an obsessive neighborhood watchman who aims to prove he’s the best man to protect her… even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Accused at 17
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Bianca's two best friends find out that Bianca's boyfriend cheated on her with fellow classmate Dory, the three of them play a prank on Dory which goes horribly wrong...and Bianca soon finds herself accused of murder by her friends.

programme.title: The Bachelor Next Door
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple becomes intrigued by the young stranger who moves in next door. He's handsome, friendly and very helpful, but he's no stranger.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Forming up a mega road train in torrid weather; one truck hits the limit.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In Townsville, Queensland, long-distance trucker Peter sets off for a cross-country haul.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Matt Adams rides a volatile load into a world of trouble with a bull on board...

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Matt Adams rustles up his roughest ride ever, and Macca McReady sails into trouble.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tanker driver Sludge tries to dodge disaster and Macca McReady hits rough weather.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Somaliland
programme.desc: Due to lack of infrastructure and leftover mines from the civil war, delivery drivers in Somaliland take their lives in their hands each time they cross the dessert.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Talking Head
programme.desc: A 12 year old boy insists his dead father told him to kill his mother's new fiancée. But did the father truly die in an accidental plane crash?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Devil Sells His Soul
programme.desc: Colonel March hypnotizes five people to solve the stabbing murder of Lord Telford, while he himself portrays the murder victim.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Murder Is Permanent
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a murder in a beauty salon; there are plenty of suspects and it's up to him to single out the murderer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: The year is 2019, and an unknown plague has transformed the world's population into blood-thirsty vampires. As humans and their blood become more scarce, vampires must search for new ways to satisfy their craving.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie stars David Hasselhoff as a sought after consultant hired by a workaholic mother (Caroline Rhea) in an effort to get her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story. Ten-year-old Wesley puts together a "Secret Santa" gift for a needy child and when ten-year-old Megan opens the package, she discovers an item that will have a huge impact on her life to come.

programme.title: Tangled up in Christmas
programme.desc: A Family Christmas turns into chaos when Elizabeth returns home and is must plan the annual charity event, with her free-spirited sister Sam. They must learn to work together or Christmas is ruined.

programme.title: A Prince and Pauper Christmas
programme.desc: A confidential informant goes missing and a young agent hires a look-a-like to play his role.

programme.title: 2014 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: After surviving a tense semifinal decided by penalty kicks, Argentina must face Germany, fresh off its rout of Brazil, to determine which team will lift the World Cup trophy. From Maracanã Stadium in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

programme.title: 1986 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: 1990 FIFA World Cup Final: Germany vs. Argentina
programme.desc: Watch the full replay from the match between Germany FR and Argentina.

programme.title: The Single Moms Club
programme.desc: Brought together by their children's potential expulsion from school, diverse single mothers (Nia Long, Amy Smart, Cocoa Brown) form a support group to help one another overcome life's challenges.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Revelations of infidelity and other secrets force eight married friends to take a hard look at issues of commitment, betrayal and forgiveness.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: Romantic sparks fly between a wealthy businessman and a struggling single mother who works as a cleaner in his office building.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: 900 Seconds with...
programme.desc: Aaron Canavan discusses his snooker journey, career highlights and life around the game in this special 15-minute edition.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: The Clermont diggers face pressure to repay $15,000 worth of gold, or risk losing their mine. Meanwhile, the Mineshaft Hunters enter an abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Adrenaline-fuelled prospecting and mining teams search for gold in some of the most remote and inhospitable areas of Australia.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A catastrophic breakdown threatens to end the Clermont Diggers' mining season, while the rookie miners' gamble to relocate their old plant ends in disaster.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Rookie miner Dennis enjoys a personal-best nugget find in a bumper day, while the Mineshaft Hunters' quest for gold is cut short when a team member takes a life threatening fall.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the Hell Creek Formation of South Dakota, with one of the greatest palaeontology discoveries ever made. However, the find brought nothing but trouble and suspicion to those who uncovered it.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Jan hasn't taken her rubbish out since 2006 and goes months without a shower. Given just 15 days to clear up before she is evicted, the experts move in to help.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: The family of cat hoarder Mary gets a nasty shock when they drop by to visit. Plus, experts help professional cleaner Annie deal with her surprising compulsion.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman has 16 storage units full of items and the fees have driven her into debt. A woman's hoarding could leave her homeless if she doesn't clean out her house.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Margret married two years ago but her home is so full, her husband never moved in, and Kathleen's habit has forced her son to forgo a scholarship to protect his sister.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Dorothy and David have put their lives at risk with their hoarding, while Doris has filled her house with so much junk she has to live elsewhere.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril’s failing chip business leads him to stage a fake contest to boost sales. Bert gets caught up and wastes money, realizing too late it’s a scam. The gang must expose the truth before others are tricked as well.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Daredevil biker Bix arrives and impresses Bert, but his reckless actions cause trouble that Cedric gets blamed for. Bert must recognize the difference between excitement and responsibility before friendships are damaged.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A supposed lake monster draws tourists to Evergreen Forest. Cyril exploits the craze by selling merchandise, while Bert and Melissa investigate the truth behind the sightings and reveal what is really going on.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs’ mother visits, believing her sons are wealthy. To maintain the lie, they scramble to impress her while hiding the truth. Meanwhile, Cyril faces pressure as their deception spirals out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Melissa captures heroic photos of Snag and gains media attention. As fame grows, Snag is offered a TV role, but must decide if he wants the spotlight or a simpler life with his friends in the forest.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cedric attends school to build confidence but returns overly strict and changed. His new personality causes friction, and both Cyril and the Raccoons must help Cedric rediscover his true self before he loses his identity.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert finds a hidden steam train in the forest, while Cyril learns it holds a fortune. Both race to locate it first, leading to a chase where history, greed, and adventure collide deep within Evergreen Forest.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley runs away during a personal crisis and hides at the fort. Meanwhile, Cyril’s new security system malfunctions, trapping him inside his mansion. Both situations spiral until help arrives from unexpected places.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph’s nomination boosts his ego, causing him to act arrogantly at the paper. Meanwhile, Cyril seeks an award but faces setbacks. Both must learn humility as their ambitions begin to damage what they value most.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A man claiming to be Cyril’s brother arrives for an inheritance. Bert suspects deception and investigates. As tensions rise, the truth about Simon’s identity is revealed, forcing Cyril to confront his past.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Harry uncovers a distasteful alliance while trying to protect his client from a hellion.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Dresden gets himself mixed up in a turf war between vampire gangs when he's pressured to repay a debt.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: When a man drops dead in Harry's office, Harry is led to investigate a complex murder plot with ties to Bob's past.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Dresden takes on a case pro bono after a woman coming to him for help is killed in front of him, but the investigation leads to dark magic and more death.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Dresden runs up against the High Council when they suspect him in the deaths of a college coed and a local mobster from black magic.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Harry is forced to get a license to continue working for the police department, but when his teacher turns up dead of black magic he teams with man's assistant in a case that takes fertile twist.

programme.title: Matlock: Blind Justice

programme.desc: Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.desc: In A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical, the creators of Back to the Future fight to bring their beloved franchise to the stage.

programme.desc: Harrison Ford scored a hit as part of the Star Wars ensemble, but many doubt he has leading man potential. When Tom Selleck falls out of the cast of Raiders of the Lost Ark, can Harrison step into the role of Indiana Jones and prove his doubters wrong?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: After a string of hits with LucasFilm, Harrison cuts and runs to work with Ridley Scott on Blade Runner where on-set clashes and chaos create a production in peril.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison dons the fedora for another Indy movie but would George Lucas’s failed marriage spell Doom for the script? And when Sean Connery joins the franchise in the third installment will there be enough screen for two leading men?

programme.title: The Sun

programme.title: Shine

programme.title: The State of Things

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: When the pilgrims bathe in a mysterious pool, they turn into babies. Tripitaka learns it’s the Fountain of Youth, guarded by the Spirits of Time Passed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Starving and lost, the pilgrims find a quiet town with hidden dangers. They learn that not all demons are enemies, nor all humans pure.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Chen-Gold, the richest man alive, seeks a husband for his daughter while greed consumes him. Obsessed with wealth, he turns himself to gold.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Yung-Hu, a lovesick goblin, falls for a married woman, I-Ling. The pilgrims teach them about love, faith, and the path toward enlightenment.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: As the pilgrims sleep, the Illiterate Vampire tries to bite Tripitaka. When discovered, he’s chased away—learning that even ignorance can be redeemed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A kind monster disguises himself as a puppy to win friends, but villagers fear him. The pilgrims teach him that goodness doesn’t need disguise.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A gangster kidnaps a psychologist's (Bradford Dillman) family to force him to uncover an informant's hiding place.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Eve becomes suspicious when an old friend (Carla Borelli) fails to keep a planned rendezvous; guest David Carradine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside's staff helps the State Department exchange an accused spy (Diana Hyland) for a captured U.S. professor.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: To get dynamite, terrorists ruin an ex-convict's (Earl Holliman) plans for a new life with his son (Vincent Van Patten).

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A prominent jockey suspected of throwing horse races is investigated by Ironside. Guest star: Joel Grey.

programme.desc: A Chinatown robbery brings Cagney's retired father back on the beat to show his daughter how to properly conduct an investigation. Guest starring Dick O'Neill as Charlie Cagney. Tyne Daly, Meg Foster, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly star.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: Up-and-coming pop star Elle Richardson is bombarded with threatening emails from a stranger hell-bent on destroying her career and ruining her life.

programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.

programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After not being seen for several days, Rita Parminter was found dead in her home in Hastings. To police, it initially appeared that she had taken her own life.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: A teen calls 911 after his mother is attacked by a man with an axe. Her violent ex-partner is caught on doorbell cam carrying the weapon. Her family say the system failed her.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: A police officer reports his wife has shot herself. But doorbell cam records a Sheriff's Deputy calling at the house earlier casting doubt on his testimony.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking

programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: After being reported missing, a young couple's bodies were discovered more than sixty miles apart. Looking at how the dedicated investigators eventually find the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is found beaten to death in Wisconsin in 1984, the killer evades detection for decades. How did a revolutionary DNA method reveal his identity?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a beloved local teacher is brutally attacked in her Pennsylvania home, her death shocks the community. After 27 years, dedicated investigators trace her killer.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry gets into a lather when a new carpet fails to arrive in time for a visit from his boss. The neighbours help him precipitate disaster.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When June volunteers to look after a neighbour's dog for a week, Terry discovers that a man's best friend can often prove fickle.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas Eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multidiscipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.

programme.desc: Nikki 'plots' to spend eternity with Oglevee.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack!
programme.desc: When Kim returns, Nikki’s roomie refuses to move out.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: The Accidental Therapist
programme.desc: Nikki forces the Professor into couples’ therapy.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: The Mack Is Like Wo!
programme.desc: The Professor appears on a popular dating show.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Mansion House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her fearless team to a onetime house, onetime museum and now a care home to investigate the strange goings on reported by staff and guests alike. It doesn’t take long for Yvette to regret her decision to go it alone in the cold dark cellar.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oak House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to Oak House, said to be one of the most haunted places in West Bromwich. Fear and fright take hold when something seems to follow them and one experience changes the belief of both Glen and Karl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Middleton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette and her team are called to a grade II listed building that spans over 900 years in an attempt to uncover the mysterious paranormal activity that is said to occur there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on their biggest challenge yet in a prison where many have lost their lives and some seem to have remained.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation takes the team to the condemned cell and execution room. Is it a hangman or one of the executed souls that makes itself present and causes the team to re-evaluate what they are doing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bank
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is dispatched to Berlin's East Zone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Heart
programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to end an inhuman situation which the United Nations has been unable to abolish: slave trade in the country of Elkabar, ruled by King Ibn Borca.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues to battle slave-trading in a Middle Eastern country by eliminating De Groot, one of the principal suppliers of victims for King Borca's slave market.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Widow
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is asked to destroy an international narcotics ring operated by Alex Cresnic and his partner Mark Walters.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil

programme.title: A Haunting: Casa de los Muertos
programme.desc: Eddie Benitez fears the spirit of a dead man who committed suicide is slowly killing his son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Child
programme.desc: Jan’s young son Cody begins communicating with an imaginary friend. She calls on a shaman.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. Thirty-three years later, local detectives reopen the investigation, only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lovers. Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3

programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.desc: The long march made by Hannibal of Carthage and his elephants to Rome and his battle for control of the Mediterranean world.

programme.desc: The story of coal, inseparable from that of the Industrial Revolution, and of social protest, the rise of socialism, anarchism and trades unions.

programme.title: Ancient Black Ops

programme.title: Ancient Black Ops: Episode 001
programme.desc: In 11th-century Persia, the Ismailis, a Shiite sect, initiated a deadly campaign against Sunni leaders. Dubbed "Assassins" by their adversaries, their lethal tactics made them infamous, feared even by Christian and Muslim foes alike.

programme.title: Ancient Black Ops: Episode 002
programme.desc: Ancient Greece faces a Persian invasion, relying on their elite Spartan 300. At Thermopylae, they hold off the Persians for two days. The Krypteia allegedly attempt to assassinate the Persian Emperor as the Spartans fight to the last man.

programme.title: Night Will Fall
programme.desc: Researchers discover film footage from World War II that turns out to be a lost documentary shot by Alfred Hitchcock and Sidney Bernstein in 1945 about German concentration camps.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can We Live Forever?
programme.desc: NOVA scienceNOW tackles the big question: can we live forever? Hosted by astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson, examine these topics: Can My Car Live Forever?; Body Shop - Body Parts; Can We Slow Aging?; and Hibernation.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Smart Can We Get?
programme.desc: How Smart Can We Get? How do you get a genius brain? Is it all in the genes? Or is it hard work? Episodes include: Einstein's Brain; Mystery of the Savant Brain; What is Intelligence?; and Profile: Sian Beilock.

programme.title: Wonders: What's the Universe Made Of?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders journeys to the stars and back to investigate what we know and don’t know about the universe. Find out how scientists are discovering new secrets about the history of the universe and why they’re predicting a shocking future.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Smart are Animals?
programme.desc: Hosted by Neil deGrasse Tyson, examine these topics: Dog Genius; Creative Dolphins; Octopus & Cuttlefish; and a profile of scientist Irene Pepperberg, who has revolutionized scientists’ ideas about animal communication and intelligence.

programme.title: scienceNOW: What Are Animals Thinking?
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what’s going on inside your pet’s mind? Segments include: Do Animals Know Right From Wrong?: Pigeon GPS: Hive Genius: and Profile - Laurie Santos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy

programme.title: Countdown to Surrender - The Last 100 Days: Downfall and Liberation

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Race For Radar

programme.desc: In Naroom's Arena Ruins, Tony, Edyn and Strag are running battle drills in an attempt to master their still-raw Final Dreamer powers... when Furok begins to act strangely.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Head Two Head / The Last of the Wild
programme.desc: Suzi and Gretchen get fused into a two-headed Gruzi!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: After a high-speed chase for a crystal, Skor’s run ends in a Chow-style roadbock: AKA a gaint pile of manure. Skor vows to “erase them from history! ” and he isn’t kidding.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor needs a brain to complete his latest creation, Frankendino. But the only brain that’s good enough is Edgar’s, so Skor hands Skrap a serrated brain spoon and sends him off to fetch it.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Linkup
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: True Blue
programme.desc: Blue Angel hopes to give her fans something to scream about by defeating Playmaker, but after receiving a dangerous card from the Knights of Hanoi, her fans might be screaming for all the wrong reasons!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon an ancient secret when their quest leads them to the Volcanic realm of Cald. Buried beneath rivers of lava, is the relic-forger, a tool used to create any relic…just by thinking of it!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Total Drama World Tour
programme.desc: The contestants are placed into teams. They take part in a camel race, weave a basket, then race towards the Nile.

programme.title: Total Drama World Tour
programme.desc: The teams are thrown out of a plane and sing for their lives before arriving in Tokyo. They must compete in a game of giant pinball.

programme.title: Total Drama World Tour
programme.desc: The contestants land in Yukon and must jump ice floes, pull a dog sled, and race towards the finish line.

programme.title: Total Drama World Tour
programme.desc: The teams arrive in New York City and must climb to the top of the Statue of Liberty and race through Central Park.

programme.title: Total Drama World Tour
programme.desc: Geoff co-hosts with Blaineley because Bridgette is in the competition.

programme.title: Total Drama World Tour
programme.desc: The teams are dumped in the German Alps and Lindsay recognises Tyler.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With one universe eliminated, the fighters redouble their efforts to win. Vegeta tussles with fighters from Universe 6, Gohan and others defend against Jium, and Krillin and Android 18 team up to defeat a blind fighter.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Caulifla fights Goku, determined to learn the secret of Super Saiyan Blue, but Kale goes berserk and interferes, threatening Goku and the other combatants.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The Pride Troopers attack when three Saiyans are cut off from their teams. As the Tournament of Power progresses, teamwork proves to be a threateningly powerful tactic.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Brianne and her companions from Universe 2 reveal their more powerful forms. No. 17 may have bitten off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Angered by the loss of their teammate but in no position to fight, the remaining warriors from Universe 2 retreat and regroup. Gohan and Piccolo face off against the last two fighters from Universe 10.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love dancing, but they love children even more. So everything stops when they watch some children painting in a most unusual way. Back at the house, a trail leads Tinky Winky all around Teletubbyland to find out.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa-Laa are out for a walk and Po is riding her scooter, but where is Tinky Winky? When the other Tubbies see him they chase him all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The farmyard boys feed their cows and calves and watch them grazing in a field. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa eat their Tubby Toast at the table, and Po eats her toast in her bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children playing with torches. In Teletubbyland, Po chases Tinky Winky, and Po catches him.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises & makes lovely roaring sounds, Dipsy & Laa-Laa laugh and run away. Some children pretend to be different animals and guess what they are. Tinky Winky hears a big roar and runs away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po pops up between Dipsy and Tinky Winky. They join Laa-Laa to watch two girls go for a tram ride around San Francisco. Laa-Laa and Po go for a walk. Laa-Laa goes the quick way and Po goes the long way.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello before they gather round to watch some children learn about the number nine. Po and Tinky Winky count nine flowers that appear in Teletubbyland and then run off to fin Dipsy and Laa-Laa and dance the Bump dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies appear one at a time to say ‘Eh-oh’. They watch some children playing with bubbles. It’s time for Tubby Custard. The custard machine makes a funny noise, and a tubby custard bubble comes out followed by more.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Daniel and Stephanie make big round pancakes. They are having a round and round day. They run round and round in Teletubbyland, but they stop to see the dancing bear in the Carousel, then there's time for one more dance.

programme.desc: A model seduces the town into joining her new trendy tanning club. // When a heat wave brings on a drought, Mona discovers a mysterious serpent creature living in the shallow river that flows through town.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A Shaman statue from South America comes to life and tries to re-grow the rainforest in the middle of Mona's town. // Charley joins a boy's camping club only to be brainwashed and programmed by the obsessed leader

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Two elderly sisters move into an old mansion in town and befriend Mona's parents. // Charley gets trapped inside the mansion of a famous mystery writer who lives alone with her creepy butler.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Soon after Charlie's aunt brings him back a genuine set of Numchucks from Japan, Charley, Mona and Lily are scared by a ninja ghost. // Mona discovers that the new boy in class is actually a Neanderthal brought back to life

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Charley accidentally awakens the all-powerful Viking god // Mona, Lily and Charley discover that Mr. Piper the substitute music teacher is an ogre

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Miss Gotto has been acting weird of late. // Who would have guessed that the Dancing Underpants Ghoulie would be haunting the old laundromat?

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona starts to suspect that someone with an animosity towards vampires wants her out of town and soon. // When Charley falls under the spell of Lucy Lanning, a girl with THE WORST singing voice at St. Faith's, Mona's suspicions are aroused.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Socks, shoes, vampire towels and other miscellaneous objects are vanishing, disappearing, as if vanishing into some void. // Garden gnomes are vanishing from front yards all over town and many townspeople suspect juvenile pranksters at work.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: The new drama coach seems to have an unhealthy obsession with trolls // Charley is thrilled when he finds a real asteroid

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: In response to a dare, Mona, Charley, Lily, and Fang venture out on a night-time mission. // When Mona's parents go out for the night, the new babysitter comes over.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden
programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Dadzilla/Tag Team Trouble
programme.desc: Kootie Pie and Big Mouth are convinced they are much too beautiful to be adopted!/Toad thinks he has lost the million gold coins the Princess had him deliver.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas
programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Two Plumbers and a Baby
programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Oh Brother/Mighty Plumber
programme.desc: A grudging hostility is aroused between the Brothers when they are Kooped up in Toad's cottage./Using a magic wand, King Koopa sucks the TV hero Mighty Plumber from the television.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bad Rap
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Robo Koopa
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have ventured to Robo Land in pursuit of King Koopa, whom they had intended to stop.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Fire of Hercufleas
programme.desc: In the ancient city of Mythis, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are searching for a legendary hero named Hercufleas, who is an old friend of Toad's.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Do The Koopa/Kootie Pie Rocks
programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A brilliant thief has masterminded a series of high-stake bank heists, and for two detectives, the only hope for survival is finding an order to the chaos.

programme.title: Triangle
programme.desc: A group of friends suffer a yachting accident and take refuge on a cruise drifting on the open sea, but quickly realize they were better off on the upturned yacht. Starring: Liam Hemsworth, Melissa George, Bryan Probets, Michael Dorman, Joshua McIvor.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The biggest little city in the world hosts the largest tournament in Northern Nevada history and the World Poker Tour captures all the final table excitement.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Bring your earplugs and put the kids to bed because the WPT Bad Boys of Poker are back in action and badder than ever.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, an $83,000,000 dollar season ends in the biggest WPT event in history with every turn of a card worth nearly four million dollars to the winner.

programme.title: Escape from Women's Prison
programme.desc: Four female convicts escape from prison and take a bus full of young female athletes hostage, and take refuge in a judge's house. Soon enough, the police surrounds the place, but the escapees are not giving up without a fight.

programme.title: Christiane F.
programme.desc: A teen girl in 1970's Berlin becomes addicted to heroin. Everything in her life slowly begins to distort and disappear as she befriends a small crew of junkies and falls in love with a drug-abusing male prostitute.

programme.title: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2
programme.desc: For a decade, Texas Ranger Lefty Enright (Dennis Hopper) has sought to avenge the brutal murder of his kin by the cannibalistic Sawyer family – Leatherface, Chop-Top, The Cook and Grandpa.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A troubled cage fighter embarks on a mission to save a young Chinese girl from the mafia.

programme.title: Good Kill
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke stars in this riveting look at the world of drone warfare, where combat unfolds like a first-person shooter game -- only with real lives at stake. With January Jones.

programme.title: The Bachelor Next Door
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple becomes intrigued by the young stranger who moves in next door. He's handsome, friendly and very helpful, but he's no stranger.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: Vows of Deception
programme.desc: When a prominent lawyer is found murdered, his wife is promptly arrested and charged with the crime. She swiftly accuses her stepson, with whom she claims to be having an affair.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: A.I. Rising
programme.desc: The relationship between a human and android spirals out of control with shocking consequences.

programme.title: The Encounter
programme.desc: When Collin is discovered naked, disoriented and alone in the forest, he struggles to recount the events of the previous night. His memories return in a series of horrific flashes of what became of his friends and fiancée.

programme.title: Red Plague
programme.desc: Journey through a world left to wind and rust, and find that home is always waiting no matter how long you've been away.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Somaliland
programme.desc: Due to lack of infrastructure and leftover mines from the civil war, delivery drivers in Somaliland take their lives in their hands each time they cross the dessert.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Gabon
programme.desc: The forests of Gabon are some of the densest and most mysterious in the world. But there are a few adventurous souls who risk it all in this green hell every day. They are the drivers of enormous logging trucks that can carry up to 40 tons of wood.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Brazil
programme.desc: Driving tankers loaded with 20.000 pounds of gasoline, these wild men drive on unmapped roads to deliver supplies to illegal gold mines in the heart of the Amazon Jungle.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bolivia
programme.desc: Hundreds of metres above the ground, crisscrossing the valleys of Bolivia, is a network of makeshift cables.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Guyana
programme.desc: The roads in Guyana are treacherous but in one difficult journey taking mining supplies across the forest Roy can earn up twice the average salary.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Kivu
programme.desc: When the Congo gained it's independence it had the best road network in central Africa, but the situation has deteriorated and today only 2% of roads are paved; during the rainy season many parts of the country turn into a muddy bog.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bangladesh
programme.desc: In Bangladesh, bamboo harvesters raft massive floats through treacherous waters to deliver their payload.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Expect the Unexpected

programme.title: Daybreakers

programme.title: The Ritual

programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Virtual Nightmare
programme.desc: Up-and-coming pop star Elle Richardson is bombarded with threatening emails from a stranger hell-bent on destroying her career and ruining her life.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Ivy League Murder
programme.desc: On January 27th 2001, two respected Dartmouth College professors, Half and Susanne Zantop, are brutally stabbed and left for dead in the study of their well-appointed New Hampshire home.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: September 27th, 1996. On a lonely stretch of Illinois highway just outside Dekatur, an abandoned car ignites the search for a vivacious and popular young mother. Investigators comb the vehicle for clues, her boyfriend makes an impassioned public plea.

programme.title: Cold Blood: The Ballad of Melissa Love
programme.desc: Country singer Melissa Haferman has just recorded her first CD in Nashville when her lifeless body is found in a vacant lot near the Louisville, Kentucky bus depot. And it will take four years and a macabre discovery before police close in on her killer.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Mommy Speak For Me
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a 14-year-old African-American girl is snatched off the street, assaulted and murdered on her way to school. Initially, detectives work the case 24/7. But it will take a lucky break and nearly 30 years before the culprit is behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Supermodel Iman surprises the girls when she stops by the house to share her beauty secrets, and TV personality/comedian Chris Spencer challenges the models skills on to be an effective spokesperson for a skin care product.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models visit Top Model Cycle 3 winner, Eva Pigford, on the set of an ELLEgirl magazine photo shoot where the beautiful models are made up for a challenge to look angry while posing in wild scenarios with the stars of MTV's series "Wild Boyz,."

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: MGM breaks camp to move everything to a new base, including its 135-foot, $250,000 derrick -- the tallest and most expensive structure in the Arctic; Drew Sherwood's first big rig solo is only to deliver junk food; a storm strikes.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After the storm clears, all the truckers are ready to roll except Rick, who is on the verge of quitting and seeks advice from Hugh; Jerry makes a second attempt at moving the MGM camp with a "two trucking" technique.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After delivering the fragile 135-foot derrick to the MGM exploration site, the truckers must also transport its base, an 80-ton substructure that ranks as the heaviest and most-dangerous load of the season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A speeding truck sideswipes Hugh Rowland on the road; Alex Debogorski pushes the limits to get one more load.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Truckers venture 200 miles north of the Arctic Circle on the most isolated and dangerous ice roads in North America to deliver vital supplies to natural gas and mineral exploration sites.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After just two days in the Arctic, the critical demands of the oil exploration sites are testing the limits of the truckers and their machines; mechanical failures threaten to halt operations; Rick has a costly mishap; Drew seeks a job.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A New Orleans man trims branches off his neighbors' hedge so he can park his car in the street, sparking their fury; neighbors in California take exception to workers climbing over their fence to fix a blocked sewer pipe.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: On a full moon, a stranger sets up an erotic photo shoot on a neighbor's porch; two Floridian landscapers are shocked when a woman begins hurling insults; a tenant becomes incensed by his landlord's unannounced visits and decides to lock her out.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: The constant beeping of a painter's lift drives a Colorado neighbor to threaten to sever the hydraulic cables with a bolt cutter; in Georgia, a neighbor calls the police on a Black babysitter; a brawl breaks out on a California beach.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.desc: This is a story of one man’s obsession to find a lost Spanish Galleon loaded with treasure. He risked everything – and faced terrible personal tragedy in his quest.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs
programme.desc: A glimpse backstage at the highly secretive annual gathering of the world's richest and most powerful movers and shakers.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A fortune in gold is buried in the Rocky Mountains, with only a cryptic map as a clue. For nearly 200 years, descendants of a French expedition have sought it. But the Curse of Treasure Mountain has thwarted all attempts to find the hidden bullion.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: Night Will Fall
programme.desc: Researchers discover film footage from World War II that turns out to be a lost documentary shot by Alfred Hitchcock and Sidney Bernstein in 1945 about German concentration camps.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On October 11, 1998, Dr. Harold Shipman is tried for murdering fifteen elderly patients. Exhumation and evidence of lethal morphine lead to his conviction. He is later found to have killed 215 people.

programme.title: scienceNOW: What Are Animals Thinking?
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what’s going on inside your pet’s mind? Segments include: Do Animals Know Right From Wrong?: Pigeon GPS: Hive Genius: and Profile - Laurie Santos.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Where Did We Come From?
programme.desc: Hosted by Neil deGrasse Tyson, examine these topics: Revealing the Origins of Life; Origins of the Solar System; Lice and Human Evolution; and a profile of neuroscientist Andre Fenton who studies how brains store and experience memories.

programme.title: Aircrash Confidential
programme.desc: Pilot error has caused many air crashes. The film examines incidents like the 1972 London and 2001 Queens crashes. Computer-controlled aircraft introduced new issues, seen in Qantas Flight 72's 2008 plunge and Air France Flight 447's 2009 disappearance.

programme.title: Wonders: Can We Make Life?
programme.desc: New tools allow researchers to use cells to create and edit their own DNA with more ease and less cost than ever before. NOVA Wonders explores the benefits and the burden of risk surrounding this controversial new technology.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The Truth is in the Stars EU

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.

programme.title: Arthur: Mom and Dad Have A Great Big Fight/D.W.'s Perfect Wish
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad fight over spilled milk, Arthur and D.W. fear the worst. Is it Arthur's fault or D.W.'s? Then, turning five is a major, big deal event! But D.W. worries that she fribbled away her preschool years on meaningless pursuits.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: To commemorate the 70th Anniversary of the Battle of Britain Ewan and Colin McGregor take to the skies to discover how; against the odds, the RAF inflicted Hitler's first defeat of WW2.

programme.title: Nuremberg - The Real Story
programme.desc: Revisiting the Nuremberg Trials, where Nazi leaders were brought to justice and the foundations of modern international law were laid.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: The Marines succeed in the "island hopping" strategy against suicidal resistance. The US Navy establishes supremacy, cutting off Japan.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: World War Weird

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts

programme.title: WPT Classics
