programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka dreams of a slain king whose throne was stolen by a Taoist imposter. With the prince’s help, the pilgrims set out to reveal the false king and restore the rightful ruler.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Fran agonizes over her cousin's suicide, until occurrences lead her to think he still lives; guest Christine Belford.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown finds a dead man in the park, but the body suddenly vanishes; guest Beth Brickell.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A stranger (Michael Callan) who gave Brown first aid turns out to be a soldier wanted for killing a WAC.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside poses as a patient in a nursing home with a high death rate; guests Ruth Roman, John Carradine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter officer (David Carradine) is accused of killing the mobster who murdered his partner; guest Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside goes to Tokyo to protect a Japanese officer (James Shigeta) who befriended him near the end of World War II.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Grandest Jewel Thief Of Them All
programme.desc: Lacey (Tyne Daly) becomes worried when Cagney (Sharon Gless) becomes obsessed with catching notorious jewel thief Albert Grand (guest star Ferdy Mayne), who despite committing several hotel safe robberies has never been convicted.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Affirmative Action
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) find that they have very mixed emotions when another female detective (guest star Talia Balsam) is assigned to the 14th precinct. Also staring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Open And Shut Case
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) faith in the legal system is tested when a solid homicide case crumbles and a friend and former rape victim is forced to relive her courtroom ordeal. Also staring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Jane Doe #37
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) refuses to drop the investigation into a murdered Jane Doe, who also happens to be a homeless woman. Cagney is determined to discover her real identity before her burial. Also starring Tyne Daly, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Date Rape
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are at odds over the investigation of a rape case. Cagney sides with the male investigators who feel the woman is at fault, while Lacey sides with the woman. Things become more complicated when the woman's past is used against her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Burn-Out
programme.desc: When Lacey's vacation is temporarily postponed, she becomes overwhelmed with her responsibilities as a cop, wife, and mother. Meanwhile, Cagney goes undercover as a nun to investigate drugs that have gone missing from a hospital.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: On June 17, 1994, a tugboat operator is towing a log boom down the Fraser River from Port Coquitlam when he notices something caught up on one of the logs. Upon closer inspection, he discovers a human body.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Incorrible
programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Scenario for a Murder
programme.desc: Since October 10th 2008, no-one has seen friendly 38 year-old bachelor John Altinger. All that his friends know is that he was going to a garage in a residential area of Edmonton, to meet a woman he’d met on an online dating site.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Legend of Cactus Jupiter/U.S Acres: Birthday Boy Roy/Jukebox Jon
programme.desc: Garfield dreams of being pioneers in outer space./Roy gets a watch for his birthday./Jon's attempt to break a habit by listening to a record in his sleep.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Squeak Previews/U.S Acres: Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Wade/A Tall Tale
programme.desc: Two mice critics review a documentary./Wade is mistakenly hypnotized to turn into a monster./The network insists that Nermal tell a story.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Moo Cow Mutt/ Big Bad Buddy Bird/Angel Puss
programme.desc: Garfield tricks Odie into thinking he's a cow./Roys agent get him a new job on the Buddy Bear's show./An angel tries to stop Garfield from being mean to Odie.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a plot by washing machines to conquer the world. Roy opens a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon gets a speeding ticket but Garfield suspects foul play. Wade tries some imagining of his own.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon buys a jewel from a phony Swami. Garfield offers the viewers a chance to make story choices with disastrous results.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is bitten by the video game bug. Orson dreams he’s double-Oh Orson again.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally brings a baby home from the grocery store. Orson makes up a story to entertain the chicks.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Dr. Bean tries again to use Odie as the basis for robot dogs. Orson dreams he’s Power Pig.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV from Madam Murray. Wade suggests the Roy Rooster Fan Club be changed to the Wade Duck fan club.

programme.title: On the Case: The East Area Rapist
programme.desc: A sexual sadist known as the East Area Rapist terrorizes California and its law enforcement officers for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: What Happened to Sarah
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl's mysterious runaway note raises difficult questions for police. Had she really left home on her own or had someone close to her pieced together writing from her journals to cover up an unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Hole in their Hearts
programme.desc: A mother of three disappears from her office in broad daylight, and the case remains open for eight years until two farmers unearth a clue.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger's Knock
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a house fire they discover a woman shot and killed inside. Police must unlock the mystery of who started the blaze to solve the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A 13-year-old does not return from her daily bike ride, and three weeks later, joggers make a grim discovery. Police connect her case to another girl's abduction and murder five months earlier, but it will take decades to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Garry Newlove
programme.desc: Garry Newlove’s wife Helen talks about the events on the night of his murder and the days afterwards, as well as her current work as a peer in the House of Lords combatting anti-social behaviour.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri
programme.desc: A 29-year-old hairdresser was found brutally stabbed on her doorstep in a quiet suburban street of London. A recording of a threatening phone call seemed to suggest the motive, but every lead comes to a dead end.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Samantha is told that her painful periods are nothing to worry about, but medication doesn't help. Brett has back pain that doctors are unable to identify, and prescribed medications damage his liver.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: A woman struggles to walk for 30 years due to an incorrect diagnosis, and a man suffers through a scarring surgery on his face. Both could have been spared suffering with correct diagnoses.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman’s mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: 24yr old Lorraine Laribo is dropped off at a bar by her sister's boyfriend. It's the last time anyone would ever see her alive again. Kenda must use his interrogation skills to find her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Felix Navidad
programme.desc: When Felix learns that his perfectionist mother Meredith (Jessica Walter) cannot host Christmas this year, he goes into a frenzy as he prepares to take over the Unger family Christmas traditions.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: To avoid a night of boredom, Oscar suggests that Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) take Felix out on their artsy cultural dates in his place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the brutal murder of grandfather Peter McMahon, whose manipulative and controlling partner killed the retired civil servant in 2012 for financial gain.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of teaching assistant Marie Stewart, whose partner left her to decompose in the garage of their family home in Holmfirth, West Yorkshire.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Felicity Paget was killed by a mystery knifeman who entered her house, and also attacked her fiancé William Webb. The fleeing attacker left footprints behind in blood.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: John Kewish was the last person to be hanged for murder on the Isle of Man in August 1872. Yet, the case continues to create controversy to this day.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: In the 1990s, electrician Tony Teare lured Corrine Bentley to remote moorland in the UK, promising her a job. In the violent attack that followed, he left her for dead.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Faith Healer
programme.desc: A trucker at a roadside rest station discovers the fully clothed body of a dead East Indian woman.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: In a Toronto suburb during the summer of 1996, a man leaves home for a business trip. He doesn’t return. Fearing foul play, his desperate wife finally reports her husband’s disappearance to the police.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Betrayed
programme.desc: 19 year old Greg Parsons is convicted of brutally murdering his mother mainly on evidence of the audio tape of a song he'd written, "Kill your Parents".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.title: The Case: The Escape Room From the Baumettes Prison (Pierre Folacci)
programme.desc: On June 26, 1999, in Marseilles, five prisoners of the Baumettes prison clung to the ropes thrown from a helicopter and took off.

programme.title: The Case: The Strangler of Strasbourg (Philip Hittinger)
programme.desc: In 2012, when Commander Philippe Hittinger was entrusted with one of the oldest “cold cases” in France, he could not imagine the outcome.

programme.title: The Case: Alone Against All Odds (Philippe Savelli)
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a paedophile rapist had been on the loose for five years in the Grenoble conurbation, in the troubled neighbourhood of La Villeneuve.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2018, a 79-year-old woman in Utah was sexually assaulted after a man broke into her home. It was the work of genetic genealogy that was able to immediately identify the man responsible.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1997, a woman is attacked on her route home; a suspect is arrested over 20 years later with the help of a genetic genealogical search.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1974, a 5-year-old girl disappears while walking to her friend's house; after 46 years, detectives are able to put the case to rest using modern DNA technology.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Ricky Davis was convicted of the 1985 murder of a woman but always maintained his innocence. It took 18 years before re-examined DNA evidence proved him right.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives work for decades to push to find the identity of the remains of two women and find their killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman takes a genealogy test to learn what happened to her estranged mother and is shocked to learn her DNA helped law enforcement identify a Jane Doe that remained a mystery for decades.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The Medfords end up at each other's throats when they try to solve other people's problems.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The Medford's attempts to relax over a weekend are thwarted by a series of events which Terry, of course, struggles to cope with.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June are looking forward to a weekend away when Terry falls ill.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry wins a giant jigsaw puzzle in his firm's raffle, but completing it proves to be anything but relaxing.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Deciding to sell his old snooker table, Terry places an advertisement in the local newspaper. Confusion over telephone numbers sends Terry and June on a fortune-hunting trail.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry is none too happy when June takes a temporary job (shocking in the early eighties!) - and when their professional paths cross, life becomes very complicated.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: June tries to learn to play the cello. How's Terry going to cope with all the practice? Ear-muffs, maybe?

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June get off to a bad start with their new neighbours in a dispute over a lawnmower. Soon things escalate, as they always do when Terry gets a bee in his bonnet over something.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: An innocent victim was lured to his death and cutting edge forensics helped to find the killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: PS 2001

programme.title: Psychic Investigators
programme.desc: Police in an upper-class New Jersey town find a nurse beaten to death in her home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators
programme.desc: Local residents find a corpse on a Florida beach, and FBI investigators soon arrest a businessman.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators
programme.desc: Skeptic investigators become believers when the psychic's visions are confirmed.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators
programme.desc: Phil Jordan leads investigators to the door of the person he thinks murdered a Georgia Roofer.

programme.title: Jonestown: Paradise Lost

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream Date

programme.desc: As fun Aunt Vesta, Raquel Welch shows Sabrina how the Other Realm half live.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trial By Fury

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed
programme.desc: A teen’s risky ghost fixation grows, while a war vet almost destroys a family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard-working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives investigating the disappearance of a woman agree a plea deal with the main suspect, her ex-husband. When he leads them to her body, they are faced with a horrific scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators expose the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father in a headline-making case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing on Valentine’s Day, detectives turn to a pollen expert, who pieces together fragments of evidence to find her body.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi

programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine, Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An African prince comes to Stalag 13 who is negotiating with the Germans for the rights in his country to build a submarine base and Hogan replaces him with Kinchloe.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Sencha’s return threatens Flint’s pups, and a storm leaves Swift down on numbers and Pandi with an opportunity.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: To Love and to Cherish
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Be a Lady

programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: With light from distant stars taking millions of years to reach us, how long might it take for alien life to answer any communication sent into space?

programme.title: Arthur: Francine Redecorates/Arthur The Loser

programme.title: Arthur: The Election/Francine Goes To War

programme.title: Arthur: The Contest/Prove It

programme.title: Vampyr
programme.desc: A drifter obsessed with the supernatural stumbles upon an inn where a severely ill adolescent girl is slowly becoming a vampire.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Ghost in the Noonday Sun
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a pirate captain is murdered by his cook after he buries his treasure and marks it on a map but the poor-memory cook must rely on the captain's ghost to re-track the loot, since the map was drawn in disappearing ink.

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Biography of the famed motorcycle daredevil, much of which was filmed in his home town of Butte, Montana. The film depicts Knievel reflecting on major events in his life just before a big jump.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: After a radio talk show host takes to the airwaves to discuss recent slayings of lonely women aboard cruise ships, she receives information that leads her to believe she knows the killer and may be the next target.

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Sorority Sister Killer
programme.desc: A grieving mother uncovers some difficult truths as she investigates the death of her eldest daughter following a seemingly drunken incident at a frat party.

programme.title: Eve Of Abduction
programme.desc: When single mom Stephanie gets engaged to single dad Jameson she receives an anonymous stalker’s threat: "Break off the engagement or I’ll kidnap your daughter!" The threats continue and her daughter is taken…

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: When evil screams throughout the world. When all the galaxies converge. When all that's fair and fine seems lost. A Hero will emerge.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Giddy Up

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jonny Rayner must take on a crocodile-infested river or delay his critical run.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jared and Johnny's epic mission grinds to a halt and Turbo is flagged down by the police.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Carl Andrews handles a gargantuan load, and Russell's mobile classroom gets shaken.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Stolen Crime
programme.desc: A man demands to be arrested for murdering his wealthy wife whose death is attributed to natural causes. A valuable coin collection holds the answers.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Error At Daybreak
programme.desc: A shady businessman collapses on an oceanside jetty, the apparent victim of a heart attack, but March discovers blood and a needle near the body.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Hot Money
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, the suspect, never out of sight, goes to his office where he locks himself in. But when the police search, there is no money!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Missing Link
programme.desc: A skull, known as the Damascus man, is stolen from a museum and Colonel March's life is imperiled trying to solve the case.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift
programme.desc: A barmaid receives a gift, a music box from a thief, dead ten years. But someone is soon murdered and Colonel March believes the music holds the key.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room
programme.desc: Murder and blackmail culminate when a call for help during a Javenese dance is the clue that Colonel March needs to prove a faulty alibi.

programme.title: A Bulldog For Christmas
programme.desc: Becky really hates Christmas. But when she is magically transformed into a cute bulldog, she has to learn the meaning of Christmas and get into the holiday spirit or she may never be changed back. An entertaining Christmas film for the whole family.

programme.title: Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, 15 years later she’d be married, with tons of debt. At Christmas, when Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick.

programme.title: A Christmas Tree Miracle
programme.desc: A warm-hearted Christmas tale to remind us that in the holiday season, the best gifts in life are the simple ones, and that miracles do happen, if you believe.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge

programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.desc: An ex-vaudevillian and reformed bank robber (Burgess Meredith) fumes when someone imitates his style; guest Susan Seaforth.

programme.desc: The proprietor (Pat Hingle) of a halfway house for reformed criminals steals from rich gangsters and gives the money to his charges.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Beautiful Shade of Death

programme.title: On the Case: A Wave Goodbye

programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple

programme.title: Murder by the Sea

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: George Worgan
programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chacey Poynter
programme.desc: Bob Poynter was old enough to be Chacey’s father. And he was married. But those were minor obstacles to her. However, when their romance hit the skids, Chacey enlisted yet another of her lovers to help bring the marriage to a brutal end.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: David Clark
programme.desc: Melanie and David Clark’s marriage was the definition of toxic. He was controlling and angry, and she had affairs. They seemed unable to tear themselves apart - until one violent incident ended their marriage for good.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Sheila Taormina, an Olympic gold medalist, finds herself receiving strange phone calls and letters from a fellow athlete. Before long, he is following her around the country.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Above the Law

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: When kickboxing champion Lee Redmond helps a woman in need, he finds himself the object of what could soon become a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Nightmare Next Door

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Twist of Hate
programme.desc: When Dawn is ready to move on from her partner, he begins a vicious campaign of stalking and threatening both her reputation and her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dire Straits
programme.desc: A college student in Staten Island meets a deceivingly charming man who sweeps her off her feet. But the relationship turns sour when his true nature is revealed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Web of Destruction
programme.desc: Mai Hlee Xiong is a beauty pageant contestant fresh out of college. A stalker is watching her every move and he'll stop at nothing to defame her good reputation.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study, but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogan's style.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: One of the strangest ecosystems on the planet is the Spiny Forest of Madagascar where almost all the plants are armed with thorns like daggers.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Philippines: Islands of Mystery
programme.desc: The Philippines are a chain of around 7,000 tropical islands in the western Pacific.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: To Love and to Cherish
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem - Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Run Fugitive, Run
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Vegas or Bust
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket - Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Playing Possum
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: To Touch The Moon
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Return of the Masked Rider
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Song of the Wild West
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In 1947, there was an unprecedented wave of UFO sightings that propelled the UFO phenomenon to the world stage. What were the US Air Force's findings?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nearly three hundred million people worldwide claim to have been abducted by aliens. Many report being subjected to torturous medical experiments. Others return with unwelcome reminders of their ordeal. Are aliens creating human hybrids?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm—bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren’t the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Millions of people believe extraterrestrial live on Earth. Are the aliens here to enlighten us or destroy us? What if the worst-case scenario happened? What would aliens do? And how would they do it?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: They’re our first line of defense in the darkest of times. And they’re often the first responders to threats from another world. Over the past 70 years the world’s military forces have come face to face with thousands of unidentified objects.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: It’s the stuff of nightmares. Emergency lines are flooded with calls as UFOs appear in the sky faster than authorities can track them.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Triangle Terror: For years, the flying saucer has been synonymous with UFO terror. But is it still the spacecraft that frightens us the most? Or has fear taken a new shape?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Countdown To Disclosure: Evidence suggests the world's governments could be on the verge of announcing everything they know about UFOs. What will this mean for our society?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens on the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: UFO Portal L.A.
programme.desc: Experts investigate why so many UFO sightings take place in Los Angeles, determining that the answer may lie underwate

programme.title: Dynasty: Body Trouble
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty: Every Picture Tells a Story
programme.desc: Surrounded by those she loves, Krystle resolves to live; Fallon takes the picture of Blake and the dead man to the morgue, unaware she is being watched; Accusing Blake of killing him twenty five years ago, Alexis vows to avenge his death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful as she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After being paralysed as a teenager, Robert met Ashleigh online and they fell in love. With news he may not have much longer to live, Robert asks Nev and Max to bring Ashleigh to him. (S6, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Robin is desperate to meet her hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for! (S6, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a "friend". But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! (S6, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Impossible Choice

programme.desc: Ashley supports Bar through his mum's health concerns. Briana tries to bring Luis and Devoin together for her girls. Jaylan grows closer to Leah and her family. (S11, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As her final step in getting her life together, Chelsea finds a GED class at a local college and takes her first practice test. Jenelle decides that rehab is the only way she'll stay clean.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek dives into the lost Jowett marque, as a 1952 Javelin finds an unexpected home. Meanwhile, Paul and Dave find a Ford Escort that's been untouched for 30 years and set to work on it.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970s Bond Bug three-wheeler divides opinion among Mathewson's customers, while a retired engineer reluctantly auctions off his father's treasured 60s Jaguar Mark 2.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and collection of tractors, but extracting them from a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.desc: Derek collects a Mark 2 Jag and explains why they made such poor getaway cars for bank robbers. A customer considers a Morris Marina as a present for his wife.

programme.desc: Lee and Kath blue light to a man who has collapsed after playing bingo, while Nic and Adam are called to an elderly lady who has been struggling to cope since her husband passed away.

programme.desc: Mick and Rachel help an amateur stunt driver who has crash-landed and damaged his back, while Lee and Stef are called to a lady with multiple allergies who has suffered a seizure.

programme.desc: Brother-and-sister paramedics Sam and Hannah receive a call to assist police with a man they suspect has taken the powerful psychoactive drug `Monkey Dust.

programme.title: Hitler & The Nazis
programme.desc: The fall of a hate-fueled and manipulative madman, and those who faithfully followed him from the invasion at Normandy, the death camps of Auschwitz-Birkenau, the military failure at Stalingrad, and the fall of Berlin.

programme.title: The Ultimate History of the Messerschmitt
programme.desc: In this program we look at the development of the Bf 109 which flew in all theaters of conflict in which the Luftwaffe was involved. More Bf 109s were built than any other fighter of the era.

programme.title: NEW: The Siege of Malta
programme.desc: At last here is the definitive story of heroism and hardship of a people uniquely and collectively awarded the George Cross 'for gallantry', and told by some of the heroic survivors.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: As one of their most controversial scientists, Heisenberg was key in the Nazis' efforts to build an atomic bomb. How close was he to achieving his goal?

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Hans Kammler's fingerprints can be found all over the Third Reich's most prestigious and deadly engineering projects, including rockets and concentration camps.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Nazi Germany boasted that its locomotives were faster and more innovative. This programme examines that claim by looking at these ‘flying trains’.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
